testcase.name: Get a nonexistent key
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Get a nonexistent key Given KVNode is running ... passed in 0.001s When I get key=unknown ... passed in 0.001s Then the response status is 404 ... passed in 0.000s And the response body is ... passed in 0.000s """ {"key":"unknown", "value": null} """
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Add and get a key
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Add and get a key Given KVNode is running ... passed in 0.001s When I get key=fish ... passed in 0.001s Then the response status is 404 ... passed in 0.000s When I put fish=fishval ... passed in 0.001s Then the response status is 200 ... passed in 0.000s When I get key=fish ... passed in 0.000s Then the response status is 200 ... passed in 0.000s And the response body is ... passed in 0.000s """ {"key":"fish", "value":"fishval"} """
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Add and delete a key
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Add and delete a key Given KVNode is running ... passed in 0.001s When I put fish=fishval ... passed in 0.001s When I delete key=fish ... passed in 0.001s When I get key=fish ... passed in 0.001s Then the response status is 404 ... passed in 0.000s And the response body is ... passed in 0.000s """ {"key":"fish", "value":null} """
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Modify a key
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Scenario: Modify a key Given KVNode is running ... passed in 0.001s Given KVNode has initial state ... passed in 0.001s """ [ {"key":"fish", "value":"fishval"}, {"key":"fish1", "value":"fishval1"}, {"key":"fish2", "value":"fishval2"} ] """ When I put fish1=modified ... passed in 0.001s Then the response status is 200 ... passed in 0.000s When I get key=fish1 ... passed in 0.000s Then the response status is 200 ... passed in 0.000s And the response body is ... passed in 0.000s """ {"key":"fish1", "value":"modified"} """
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
